content_body: Dear Knight Family, how can we thank you enough for letting us stay in the most exquisite lodge we've ever seen! Absolutely beautiful in every detail! The "Great Room" was ideal for making music, and we filled it with the strings quartets, Schumann, Mozart, Brahms. We were happy! The composers were, as well! Haha! We ate breakfest outside in the cool mountain air, warm sun, and bird songs. So sweet! So memorable! Last night we read out loud and laughed a lot over our own little feast of wine and cheese. It's all been a wonderful weekend thanks to you!
title: Wonderful Weekend Thanks To You
